{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/composite-skills-agents/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. composite-skills-agents

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [01-why-binary-incomplete.md|01-why-binary-incomplete.md] — 
* [02-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md|02-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md] — > [!TIP]
* [03-what-makes-csa.md|03-what-makes-csa.md] — 
* [04-sub-agent-registry.md|04-sub-agent-registry.md] — > [!TIP]
* [05-configuration-ensembles.md|05-configuration-ensembles.md] — 
* [06-coordination-disagreement.md|06-coordination-disagreement.md] — 
* [07-economics-combinatorial.md|07-economics-combinatorial.md] — 
* [08-seven-domains.md|08-seven-domains.md] — > [!TIP]
* [09-okwf-integration.md|09-okwf-integration.md] — > [!TIP]
* [10-risks.md|10-risks.md] — > [!TIP]
* [11-open-questions.md|11-open-questions.md] — > [!TIP]
* [12-call-for-collaboration.md|12-call-for-collaboration.md] — 
* [13-closing.md|13-closing.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [253-table-of-contents|docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.41)
* [253-table-of-contents|docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.40)
* [README|docs/nautilus/professional-colleague-agents-en/README.md] (сходство 0.30)
